case_title: MARLESHA G WILSON ET AL VS. CREDIT LENDING SERVICES INC,

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT CREDIT LENDING SERVICES INC, A CALIFORNIA CORP

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-15-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-15-2022 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF MARLESHA G. WILSON IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF BRANDON JACKSON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CREDIT LENDING SERVICES INC, IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY BETTY VILLEGAS (RECOVERY SPECIALIST). PARTIES STIPULATED TO HAVE THEIR MATTER HEARD BY A PRO TEM JUDGE. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ERIC GROVER; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
